name: Irish Cream Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Combine the vanilla crumbs and butter in a medium-size bowl. Press mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
3. Bake for five minutes, then remove from the oven and set aside.
4. In a large bowl, beat together the cream cheese and sugar until smooth.
5. Add the eggs, flour, Irish cream liqueur, and vanilla, beating until well combined.
6. Pour the mixture onto the prepared crust in the springform pan.
7. Bake for 40 minutes.
8. Turn off the oven and let the cheesecake cool inside for another 15 minutes.
9. Remove from the oven and let it cool completely before refrigerating overnight.
The Charleston Gazette, March 13, 1996
